calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant 650 Second Street Owners' Association, a California corporation.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Rachel L. Chanin, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Monty Agarwal, who was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant 650 Second Street Owners' Association, a California corporation.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract was filed on August 27, 2018.
Substitute service of defendants Hill & Co. Property Management, Inc., a California corporation, and 650 Second Street, Owners' Association, a California corporation, occurred on September 6, 2018, and was effectuated on September 16, 2018.
Defaults as to defendants Hill & Co. Property Management, Inc., a California corporation, and 650 Second Street Owners' Association, a California corporation, were entered on November 1, 2018.
Dismissal as to defendant Hill & Co. Property Management, Inc., a California corporation, was filed on January 9, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on January 9, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Monty Agarwal, and against the Defaulted Defendant 650 Second Street Owners' Association, a California corporation, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $3,639.46.
Attorney Fees - $5,200.00.
Costs - $435.00.

Total - $9,274.46.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Continued To Apr-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2018 Continued To Jan-09-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
